title: Working paper on strategic concepts (D3.1 from the CDE4Peace project)
author: Nikolay Pavlov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Working paper presents a review of several prominent strategic concepts and approaches in the area of EU conflict prevention and peacebuilding. The desk review has been carried out under WP3 (Review) of the CDE4Peace project. The review is focussed on resilience and the integrated approach; ‘conflict sensitivity’ and ‘the whole-of-society’ concept. The Working paper seeks to extract the main features of strategic concepts in EU peacebuilding for a potential application in quantitative research. A method for decomposing strategic concepts into quantifiable variables by means of peace indicators is elaborated and critically assessed.
